headline: Is Dow (DOW) Still Attractive After Its Strong Year To Date Share Price Surge
summary: Wondering whether Dow's share price reflects its underlying worth, or if the market is missing something important about this chemicals heavyweight. Dow's share price recently closed at US$40.56, with a 21.9% return over 30 days, 67.1% year to date, and 57.4% over the last year, set against a 3.1% decline over the past week and longer term 3 and 5 year declines of 13.2% and 16.5%. These mixed returns suggest shifting sentiment around Dow, with recent strength contrasting with weaker multi...
